text: Claude Code hooks cannot rewrite tool_results; HEADROOM needs a proxy
verify_hash must use 'git status --porcelain -uall' — plain porcelain collapses untracked files in NEW dirs into a dir entry with no extension, hiding source files from the verify gate
Star Alliance commits at EACH Stop via turn-finalize.sh (git add -A) AND per-file via autocommit.sh; verify-gate sits before turn-finalize so a block stops that round's commit (no un-commit)

All 34 workflows run serial (0 parallel, 2 doer). Swarm-efficiency upgrade: add per-step exec=spawn|inline|doer + parallel=true; fan out independent member steps so real helpers run concurrently (saves time+tokens). Quartermaster to author workflow schema bump + reclassify steps in Wave 3.

Lex Council live DB (project bqgrpnsvplvicnmzxwkm) unreachable 2026-07-03: postgres role password in ~/.config/supabase/lexcouncil.key is rejected + pooler circuit-breaker tripped (ECIRCUITBREAKER). Reset DB password in Supabase dashboard, update the key file, wait ~15min for breaker. supabase.py venv rebuilds fine (delete ~/.config/supabase/venv/.psycopg_ready). Workaround: read schema from generated packages/supabase/src/types.ts + supabase/migrations SQL in the Lex Council App repo.
